docs.title: Using Icon Packages
docs.text: django-iconx works with any SVG icons. Install a package (npm, pip, or manual download), point your config at the SVG directory, and generate.

docs.title: Setup
docs.text:
Install your icon packages and symlink or copy them into your static directory:

npm install lucide-static heroicons
mkdir -p static/icons
ln -s ../../node_modules/lucide-static/icons static/icons/lucide
ln -s ../../node_modules/heroicons/24/outline static/icons/heroicons

Configure your icon sets in Django settings:

STATICFILES_DIRS = [BASE_DIR / "static"]

ICONX = {
    "sets": [
        {"path": "icons/lucide/"},
        {"path": "icons/heroicons/", "prefix": "hero"},
        {"path": "icons/custom/", "prefix": "custom", "color": "original"},
    ],
}

Generate the CSS:

python manage.py iconx_generate

Use one set or many -- just add or remove entries from the list. Use "prefix" to namespace sets and avoid name collisions. Use "color": "original" for multi-color SVGs that should preserve their fill colors.

The source doesn't matter -- npm packages, downloaded zips, your own SVGs. The only requirement is that the directory is reachable from STATICFILES_DIRS.

docs.title: Pre-commit hook
docs.text:
To keep the generated CSS in sync, add iconx_generate as a pre-commit hook:

# .pre-commit-config.yaml
- repo: local
  hooks:
    - id: iconx-generate
      name: iconx-generate
      entry: python manage.py iconx_generate
      language: system
      pass_filenames: false
      files: \.svg$

This re-generates the CSS whenever SVG files change.

docs.title: 0.1.0a2
docs.text:
• CSS generation from SVG icon sources via iconx_generate management command
  • Two embedding modes: data_uri (inline) and url (external, with STATIC_URL prefix)
  • Multiple icon sets with configurable prefixes and regex-based path matching
  • Mono icons via mask-image + currentColor, multi-color icons via background-image
  • Automatic size variant detection from numbered subdirectories (e.g. 16/, 24/)
  • Tailwind text-* class overrides that swap to the nearest size variant
  • {% icon %} template tag with accessibility defaults and attribute pass-through
  • --subset, --dry-run, --skip-name-collisions CLI flags
  • Django 5.2 and 6.0 support, Python 3.12+
